title: Japan core inflation rate in June creeps up from 4-year low as higher oil prices bite
summary: This is the first rise in core inflation since March, and was in line with the1.6% growth expected by economists polled by Reuters.

title: Lithium Prices Sink To Five-Month Lows Amid Oversupply Jitters
summary: Lithium prices have sunk to a five-month low as the return of previously idled mine capacity triggered fears of a massive market oversupply. title: Odds of Federal Reserve rate hike surge as oil prices rip higher
summary: Investors are increasingly readying for the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates in September.

title: Hybrid Hydropower Could Unlock Europe’s Next Renewable Energy Boom
summary: There is major potential to develop hybrid renewable energy projects on existing hydropower sites, according to a new report by the think tank Ember Energy. title: Oil price surge drives global bond sell-off
summary: Brent crude’s rise above $100 threatens a prolonged surge in inflation and resetting interest rate expectations

title: US oil refineries run at breakneck speeds as wars choke fuel supplies
summary: High utilisation rates create risks of outages at a time when fuel prices are already up sharply
